---
name: Narrative Design
about: Discuss a narrative behaviour, character design question, or cognitive model concern
title: "[Narrative] "
labels: narrative
assignees: ''
---

> This template is for discussions about how characters think, feel, remember, and decide — not about code. Use it when you want to explore whether the engine models a narrative situation correctly, or to propose an improvement to the cognitive model.

---

## Narrative problem

<!-- Describe the narrative situation or scenario you are examining. No code required. -->

## Current behaviour

<!-- How does the engine currently handle this situation? What does a character do or feel? -->

## Desired behaviour

<!-- What should a character do or feel in this situation? What would feel narratively correct? -->

## Impact on cognition

<!-- Does this change how the character analyses the situation or what influences are active? -->

## Impact on memory

<!-- Does this change what the character should remember, how long, or with what weight? -->

## Impact on the decision model

<!-- Does this change what the character decides, or how that decision is reached? -->

## Possible risks

<!--
Could this change create unintended consequences?
For example: characters that behave inconsistently, memory that grows unbounded, decisions that contradict established personality.
-->
